name: Eyce PV1 Vaporizer
summary: A rugged conduction dry-herb portable with guided heat settings and a replaceable battery, for patients who want durable, no-thinking operation.
description: The Eyce PV1 is built to be knocked about: an anodised aluminium body with a silicone grip and a glass-coated ceramic oven. Its AutoFlow system steps through four heat presets over a five-minute cycle, so you get a balanced extraction without setting anything yourself — an LED ring shows the stage and haptics tell you when it's ready. The 0.5g chamber and removable 3000mAh battery give roughly 12-14 sessions per charge, with USB-C charging and a Stealth Mode for discretion. For a UK patient who wants a tough, guided device rather than fine manual control, the PV1 keeps things simple. One-year warranty.
